<?php /* * This file is part of the Predis package. * * (c) 2009-2020 Daniele Alessandri * (c) 2021-2025 Till Krüss * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace Predis\Connection; use Predis\Command\CommandInterface; /** * Defines a connection used to communicate with a single Redis node. */ interface NodeConnectionInterface extends ConnectionInterface { /** * Returns a string representation of the connection. * * @return string */ public function __toString(); /** * Returns the underlying resource used to communicate with Redis. * * @return mixed */ public function getResource(); /** * Returns the parameters used to initialize the connection. * * @return ParametersInterface */ public function getParameters(); /** * Pushes the given command into a queue of commands executed when * establishing the actual connection to Redis. * * @param CommandInterface $command Instance of a Redis command. */ public function addConnectCommand(CommandInterface $command); /** * Reads a response from the server. * * @return mixed */ public function read(); }
